welcome_message:
Welcome to the AgentOps DAB Template!

This scaffolds a production-grade Databricks Agent project. Pick the components you need:
  - retriever  : data ingestion, chunking, and Vector Search index
  - tools      : Unity Catalog functions (ask_ai, summarize, translate, execute_python_code)
  - agent      : LangGraph agent, evaluation, model serving, and chat app
  - evaluation : golden-dataset curator app + MergeReviewedTraces job

See README.md in the generated project for full setup instructions.

project_name.description: Project name — lowercase letters, digits, underscores or hyphens only (used as a prefix for bundle names, resource names, and UC schema names)

uc_catalog.description: Unity Catalog catalog name (must already exist in your workspace)

include_retriever.description: Include the retriever bundle? (data ingestion + chunking + Vector Search index)

include_tools.description: Include the tools bundle? (Unity Catalog functions: ask_ai, summarize, translate, execute_python_code)

include_agent.description: Include the agent bundle? (LangGraph agent + evaluation + model serving + Databricks App chat UI)

include_evaluation.description: Include the evaluation bundle? (golden-dataset curator Databricks App + MergeReviewedTraces job)

vector_search_endpoint.description: Vector Search endpoint name (used by the retriever and agent bundles)

llm_model_name.description: Foundation model ID for the agent (e.g. databricks-meta-llama-3-3-70b-instruct)

github_runner_group.description: GitHub Actions runner group name for self-hosted runners
